g.text: Inter-VLAN routing · SVI gateways · DHCP relay

svg.text: My work: 100% infrastructure — Proxmox, VMs (VirtIO), Windows Server, Zimbra, all network configs
Teammate: FreePBX IVR configuration, extension/ring group setup
Phones auto-provisioned via DHCP + TFTP · Voicemail delivered to Zimbra as email attachments
NAT overload on router for internet · DHCP relay on all SVIs to 172.16.32.2
